name: Steamed Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a ceramic dish, layer shredded cabbage with onions.
2. Sprinkle sugar over the layers.
3. Whisk together oil, vinegar, salt, pepper, celery salt, and dry mustard in a separate bowl until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture over the cabbage; seal tightly and refrigerate for 24 hours.
5. Mix well before serving.
6. Optional: Add celery seeds and a dash of cayenne. Substitute 3 bell peppers for one of the onions.
